name: Team Rwby | jay-marvel
description:
the narrative presents the Hunter's or Grimm's POV.

None of the RWBY members have been seen since the mission, but all the hunters sent to investigate the disappearance site have disappeared. Years later, discovered why...

==============================

I created two initial messages; the first is the hunter's point of view, and the other is the Grimm's point of view.

note about the BOT: This bot contains the RWBY team: Ruby Rose, Weiss Schnee, Blake Belladonna, and Yang Xiao Long. I hope you enjoy it, and please let me know if you experience any issues with the bot. I’ve also added a Grimm bot.

Creator's note: Hi everyone, here's a new bot with all 4 playable characters together instead of solo. In a few days I'll post another bot and another one I'm planning to make. Anyway, have fun!
